entries.title: Classical Conditioning
entries.content: Learning by association (Pavlov). Neutral stimulus paired with unconditioned stimulus until neutral alone triggers response.

entries.title: Maslow's Hierarchy of Needs
entries.content: Motivation pyramid: physiological → safety → love/belonging → esteem → self-actualization. Lower needs must be met before higher ones dominate.

entries.title: Cognitive Dissonance
entries.content: Mental discomfort when beliefs and actions conflict. People often change attitudes or rationalize to reduce dissonance.

entries.title: Working Memory
entries.content: Short-term system holding ~4 items actively (revised from Miller's 7±2). Used for reasoning, comprehension, and learning.

entries.title: Growth Mindset
entries.content: Belief that abilities can develop through effort and learning (Dweck). Contrasts with fixed mindset; improves resilience and performance.
